who: accounting firms using QuickBooks for 10-50 clients
offer: For accounting firms using QuickBooks for 10-50 clients, manual calculations cause delays in financial reporting. We automate depreciation schedule generation instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem: Manual calculations of fixed asset depreciation schedules are time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for asset details and monthly schedule generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
